intent: In-game smoke-test gate for Phase 1 (VoxelEntities). Full checklist: docs/smoke-test-phase1.md

steps.intent: VoxelEntities=false baseline. Capture with `wsm3d screenshot phase 1 -Name before` (see docs/smoke-test-phase1.md).
VoxelEntities=true, same scene and camera. Capture with `wsm3d screenshot phase 1 -Name after` (docs/smoke-test-phase1.md).
Voxel buildings closeup with VoxelEntities on. Capture with `wsm3d screenshot phase 1 -Name buildings` (docs/smoke-test-phase1.md).
